mapper.select: select id, category_id, label_id, sort_num, created_by, created_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted from subject_category_label where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into subject_category_label(category_id, label_id, sort_num, created_by, created_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{categoryId}, #{labelId}, #{sortNum}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update:
update subject_category_label
category_id = #{categoryId},
label_id = #{labelId},
sort_num = #{sortNum},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
where id = #{id}
